name: aura-lyrics
description: A Document Picture-in-Picture Spicetify lyrics extension with album-art ambience and spring animations.

scripts.lint: biome check package.json tsconfig.json vite.config.ts playwright.config.ts biome.json src tests scripts install .github/workflows
scripts.format: biome check --write package.json tsconfig.json vite.config.ts playwright.config.ts biome.json src tests scripts install .github/workflows
